name: Dungeons Bomb
short_description: Dungeons Bomb is a fast-paced arcade-style game for 1 to 4 players—play together online or offline as you chase high scores or dive into thrilling battle modes like Challenge, Deathmatch, Battle Royale, Hunt Challenge, and Color Battle.
detailed_description:
💥Dungeons Bomb - Arcade Chaos Meets Explosive Fun!

Dungeons Bomb is a fast-paced, arcade-style blast-fest for 1 to 4 players. Whether you're teaming up locally or connecting online, you'll be chasing high scores and blowing up the competition across multiple exciting game modes!

🧨 CHALLENGE MODE

Go solo or team up with friends to push your skills to the limit. Race against time, chain your combos, and set a new high score!

💣 DEATHMATCH

Pure chaos. Pure fun. Outblast your friends in a bomb-filled brawl. Most eliminations wins—watch the timer!

👑 BATTLE ROYALE

Only one will survive. Drop into the arena and outsmart, outbomb, and outlast everyone else!

🎯 HUNT CHALLENGE

Sharpen your aim—this is a monster-slaying showdown! Compete to rack up the most kills before the round ends.

🎨 COLOR BATTLE

Territory takes tactics. Place bombs to claim the ground in your color. The player with the most covered area wins the match!

💡 Explosive action, party-game vibes, and tons of replay value—Dungeons Bomb is easy to pick up and impossible to put down.

🔥 Gameplay Overview

Dungeons Bomb combines the nostalgic charm of arcade classics with fast-paced, strategic gameplay that keeps players on their toes. Drop into maze-like dungeons, place bombs, collect power-ups, and outmaneuver both monsters and friends in a series of chaotic game modes!

You’ll dodge explosions, trap enemies, and use clever tactics to gain the upper hand—whether you’re hunting high scores or competing in a last-player-standing battle. The controls are simple, but the action ramps up quickly!

🎨 Default Characters

Start the game with 8 colorful default characters—each represented by a bold color and ready to dive into the action. These vibrant variations help players quickly identify themselves in the chaos, making them perfect for local or online multiplayer fun!

🎁 Add More 2 Colors - MINT AND GREY

🎁 New Guest Characters – From Holiday Farm!

Celebrate the chaos with two special guest characters from Holiday Farm! These festive visitors bring a fresh vibe (and a few surprises) into the dungeon.

🤖 Adorable (but Deadly) Monsters

Don’t be fooled by their cute looks—these robotic dungeon dwellers are here to ruin your run! Each monster in Dungeon Bomb is uniquely designed with charm and personality, but you’ll need sharp reflexes (and well-placed bombs) to survive their onslaught.
